## [00:00 - 01:34]

Okay, module six. This module is all about internal launches and seed launches, which are two of my absolute favorite types of launches. So you've already gotten the overall concept of PLF. You've learned about the pre-pre, you've learned about the pre-launch, you've learned about open cart. So you've got all the pieces together. Now we're going to assemble those pieces into your internal launch and or your seed launch. Now the reason I love these launches, I consider these like the most elegant launches and maybe that just shows you what a marketing geek I am that I can think about launches and promotions as being elegant. But I love them because you're launching to your list. However big or small that list is, but you can control every piece of the launch. Later on when we talk about joint venture launches, they're really cool and they can go really, really big and I love them as well. But you don't have as much control over the launch process because you're depending on other partners. Here in the internal launch and the seed launch, it's just you can control every piece and it can be just absolutely beautiful. So this is for most people where you're going to start with either the seed launch or the internal launch. I think this is just like every other module. Just take it step by step, go through it, baby steps, progress, not perfection and you're going to be done in no time. So scroll down, leave a comment, let me know you're here, let me know if you're thinking about doing a seed launch or an internal launch and I can't wait to see what you're going to do.
